verses.1: A Maskil of Ethan the Ezrahite. I will sing of the graciousness of the LORD forever; To all generations I will make Your faithfulness known with my mouth.
verses.2: For I have said, “Graciousness will be built up forever; In the heavens You will establish Your faithfulness.”
verses.3: “I have made a covenant with My chosen; I have sworn to My servant David,
verses.4: I will establish your descendants forever And build up your throne to all generations.” Selah
verses.5: The heavens will praise Your wonders, LORD; Your faithfulness also in the assembly of the holy ones.
verses.6: For who in the skies is comparable to the LORD? Who among the sons of the mighty is like the LORD,
verses.7: A God greatly feared in the council of the holy ones, And awesome above all those who are around Him?
verses.8: LORD God of armies, who is like You, mighty LORD? Your faithfulness also surrounds You.
verses.9: You rule the surging of the sea; When its waves rise, You calm them.
verses.10: You Yourself crushed Rahab like one who is slain; You scattered Your enemies with Your mighty arm.
verses.11: The heavens are Yours, the earth also is Yours; The world and all it contains, You have established them.
verses.12: The north and the south, You have created them; Tabor and Hermon shout for joy at Your name.
verses.13: You have a strong arm; Your hand is mighty, Your right hand is exalted.
verses.14: Righteousness and justice are the foundation of Your throne; Mercy and truth go before You.
verses.15: Blessed are the people who know the joyful sound! LORD, they walk in the light of Your face.
verses.16: In Your name they rejoice all the day, And by Your righteousness they are exalted.
verses.17: For You are the glory of their strength, And by Your favor our horn is exalted.
verses.18: For our shield belongs to the LORD, And our king to the Holy One of Israel.
verses.19: Once You spoke in vision to Your godly ones, And said, “I have given help to one who is mighty; I have exalted one chosen from the people.
verses.20: “I have found My servant David; With My holy oil I have anointed him,
verses.21: With whom My hand will be established; My arm also will strengthen him.
verses.22: “The enemy will not deceive him, Nor will the son of wickedness afflict him.
verses.23: “But I will crush his adversaries before him, And strike those who hate him.
verses.24: “My faithfulness and My favor will be with him, And in My name his horn will be exalted.
verses.25: “I will also place his hand on the sea, And his right hand on the rivers.
verses.26: “He will call to Me, ‘You are my Father, My God, and the rock of my salvation.’
verses.27: “I will also make him My firstborn, The highest of the kings of the earth.
verses.28: “I will maintain My favor for him forever, And My covenant shall be confirmed to him.
verses.29: “So I will establish his descendants forever, And his throne as the days of heaven.
verses.30: “If his sons abandon My Law And do not walk in My judgments,
verses.31: If they violate My statutes And do not keep My commandments,
verses.32: Then I will punish their wrongdoing with the rod, And their guilt with afflictions.
verses.33: “But I will not withhold My favor from him, Nor deal falsely in My faithfulness.
verses.34: “I will not violate My covenant, Nor will I alter the utterance of My lips.
verses.35: “Once I have sworn by My holiness; I will not lie to David.
verses.36: “His descendants shall endure forever, And his throne as the sun before Me.
verses.37: “It shall be established forever like the moon, And a witness in the sky is faithful.” Selah
verses.38: But You have rejected and refused, You have been full of wrath against Your anointed.
verses.39: You have repudiated the covenant of Your servant; You have profaned his crown in the dust.
verses.40: You have broken down all his walls; You have brought his strongholds to ruin.
verses.41: All who pass along the way plunder him; He has become a disgrace to his neighbors.
verses.42: You have exalted the right hand of his adversaries; You have made all his enemies rejoice.
verses.43: You also turn back the edge of his sword, And have not made him stand in battle.
verses.44: You have put an end to his splendor And cast his throne to the ground.
verses.45: You have shortened the days of his youth; You have covered him with shame. Selah
verses.46: How long, LORD? Will You hide Yourself forever? Will Your wrath burn like fire?
verses.47: Remember what my lifespan is; For what futility You have created all the sons of mankind!
verses.48: What man can live and not see death? Can he save his soul from the power of Sheol? Selah
verses.49: Where are Your former acts of favor, Lord, Which You swore to David in Your faithfulness?
verses.50: Remember, Lord, the taunt against Your servants; How I carry in my heart the taunts of all the many peoples,
verses.51: With which Your enemies have taunted, LORD, With which they have taunted the footsteps of Your anointed.
verses.52: Blessed be the LORD forever! Amen and Amen.
